The **1989–90 AHL season** was the [54th](/wiki/List_of_AHL_seasons "List of AHL seasons") season of the [American Hockey League](/wiki/American_Hockey_League "American Hockey League").

Fourteen teams played 80 games each in the schedule. The [Sherbrooke Canadiens](/wiki/Sherbrooke_Canadiens "Sherbrooke Canadiens") repeated finishing first overall in the regular season. The [Springfield Indians](/wiki/Springfield_Indians "Springfield Indians") won their sixth [Calder Cup](/wiki/Calder_Cup "Calder Cup") championship.

## Calder Cup playoffs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1989%E2%80%9390_AHL_season&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Calder Cup playoffs")]

Main article: [1990 Calder Cup playoffs](/wiki/1990_Calder_Cup_playoffs "1990 Calder Cup playoffs")

The league instituted trophies for division champions in the playoffs; the [Richard F. Canning Trophy](/wiki/Richard_F._Canning_Trophy "Richard F. Canning Trophy") in the North Division, and the [Robert W. Clarke Trophy](/wiki/Robert_W._Clarke_Trophy "Robert W. Clarke Trophy") in the South Division.

| --- | --- |
| [Calder Cup](/wiki/Calder_Cup "Calder Cup") *Playoff champions*: | [Springfield Indians](/wiki/Springfield_Indians "Springfield Indians") |
| [Richard F. Canning Trophy](/wiki/Richard_F._Canning_Trophy "Richard F. Canning Trophy") *North division playoff champions*: | [Springfield Indians](/wiki/Springfield_Indians "Springfield Indians") |
| [Robert W. Clarke Trophy](/wiki/Robert_W._Clarke_Trophy "Robert W. Clarke Trophy") *South division playoff champions*: | [Rochester Americans](/wiki/Rochester_Americans "Rochester Americans") |
| [F. G. "Teddy" Oke Trophy](/wiki/F._G._%22Teddy%22_Oke_Trophy "F. G. \"Teddy\" Oke Trophy") *Regular season champions, North Division*: | [Sherbrooke Canadiens](/wiki/Sherbrooke_Canadiens "Sherbrooke Canadiens") |
| [John D. Chick Trophy](/wiki/John_D._Chick_Trophy "John D. Chick Trophy") *Regular season champions, South Division*: | [Rochester Americans](/wiki/Rochester_Americans "Rochester Americans") |

Individual awards

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Les Cunningham Award](/wiki/Les_Cunningham_Award "Les Cunningham Award") *Most valuable player*: | [Paul Ysebaert](/wiki/Paul_Ysebaert "Paul Ysebaert") – [Utica Devils](/wiki/Utica_Devils "Utica Devils") |
| [John B. Sollenberger Trophy](/wiki/John_B._Sollenberger_Trophy "John B. Sollenberger Trophy") *Top point scorer*: | [Paul Ysebaert](/wiki/Paul_Ysebaert "Paul Ysebaert") – [Utica Devils](/wiki/Utica_Devils "Utica Devils") |
| [Dudley "Red" Garrett Memorial Award](/wiki/Dudley_%22Red%22_Garrett_Memorial_Award "Dudley \"Red\" Garrett Memorial Award") *Rookie of the year*: | [Donald Audette](/wiki/Donald_Audette "Donald Audette") – [Rochester Americans](/wiki/Rochester_Americans "Rochester Americans") |
| [Eddie Shore Award](/wiki/Eddie_Shore_Award "Eddie Shore Award") *Defenceman of the year*: | [Eric Weinrich](/wiki/Eric_Weinrich "Eric Weinrich") – [Utica Devils](/wiki/Utica_Devils "Utica Devils") |
| [Aldege "Baz" Bastien Memorial Award](/wiki/Aldege_%22Baz%22_Bastien_Memorial_Award "Aldege \"Baz\" Bastien Memorial Award") *Best goaltender*: | [Jean-Claude Bergeron](/wiki/Jean-Claude_Bergeron "Jean-Claude Bergeron") – [Sherbrooke Canadiens](/wiki/Sherbrooke_Canadiens "Sherbrooke Canadiens") |
| [Harry "Hap" Holmes Memorial Award](/wiki/Harry_%22Hap%22_Holmes_Memorial_Award "Harry \"Hap\" Holmes Memorial Award") *Lowest goals against average*: | [Jean-Claude Bergeron](/wiki/Jean-Claude_Bergeron "Jean-Claude Bergeron") and [Andre Racicot](/wiki/Andr%C3%A9_Racicot "André Racicot") – [Sherbrooke Canadiens](/wiki/Sherbrooke_Canadiens "Sherbrooke Canadiens") |
| [Louis A. R. Pieri Memorial Award](/wiki/Louis_A._R._Pieri_Memorial_Award "Louis A. R. Pieri Memorial Award") *Coach of the year*: | [Jim Roberts](/wiki/Jim_Roberts_(ice_hockey,_born_1940) "Jim Roberts (ice hockey, born 1940)") – [Springfield Indians](/wiki/Springfield_Indians "Springfield Indians") |
| [Fred T. Hunt Memorial Award](/wiki/Fred_T._Hunt_Memorial_Award "Fred T. Hunt Memorial Award") *Sportsmanship / Perseverance*: | [Murray Eaves](/wiki/Murray_Eaves "Murray Eaves") – [Adirondack Red Wings](/wiki/Adirondack_Red_Wings "Adirondack Red Wings") |
| [Jack A. Butterfield Trophy](/wiki/Jack_A._Butterfield_Trophy "Jack A. Butterfield Trophy") *MVP of the playoffs*: | [Jeff Hackett](/wiki/Jeff_Hackett "Jeff Hackett") – [Springfield Indians](/wiki/Springfield_Indians "Springfield Indians") |
